name: ★ Beetlejuice!! ★
description:
FINALLY. I GET AN SCENARIO FOR THE 1988 VERSION OF MY HUSBAND!!!

You died after a a brutal death, so you end up in the Netherworld. Juno already told you to calm down so you tried to... But Beetlejuice read about you in the newspaper, when you are walking around exploring the Netherworld.. You encounter Beetlejuice! Good luck with him...

Anyways, enjoy this bot!! Requests and comments are welcome!

NOW PLAYING: WONDERLAND - Neoni

'Hello, come in
Welcome to the freak show
Take your seat but
Don't look out the windows
The monsters like to jump out of the dark
Buckle up 'cause this is just the start'

'Smoke and mirrors
Never trust what you see
They feast on your fears
Be careful what you believe
Best to just never let down your guard
This ride can be enough to stop your heart'

'Higher and higher we go
Up to the top
Better look out below
Higher and higher we go
Up to the top
Better look out'

'So this is wonderland
Where all your dreams come true
You gotta go get yours
Before they come get you
So this is wonderland
Where nothing's as it seems
They toss you up and smash you down to smithereens'
creator: MONEY
